proof:
have hdecomp :
    constApproxError2 u0 u1 c =
      p0ProjectionResidualSq2 u0 u1 + 2 * (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) ^ 2 := by
  unfold constApproxError2 p0ProjectionResidualSq2 cellAverage2
  ring
rw [hdecomp]
nlinarith [sq_nonneg (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c)]

unfold weightedP0Average
have hsum : (∑ i ∈ s, m i * (c * u i)) = c * (∑ i ∈ s, m i * u i) := by
  rw [Finset.mul_sum]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro i hi
  ring
rw [hsum]
ring

have hLeftLower : -M ≤ uLeft := (abs_le.mp hLeft).1
have hLeftUpper : uLeft ≤ M := (abs_le.mp hLeft).2
have hRightLower : -M ≤ uRight := (abs_le.mp hRight).1
have hRightUpper : uRight ≤ M := (abs_le.mp hRight).2
have hLowerStep :
    laxFriedrichsStep cfl (-M) (-M) ≤ laxFriedrichsStep cfl uLeft uRight :=
  laxFriedrichsStep_monotone cfl (-M) (-M) uLeft uRight
    hcflLower hcflUpper hLeftLower hRightLower
have hLower : -M ≤ laxFriedrichsStep cfl uLeft uRight := by
  simpa [laxFriedrichsStep_const] using hLowerStep
have hUpperStep :
    laxFriedrichsStep cfl uLeft uRight ≤ laxFriedrichsStep cfl M M :=
  laxFriedrichsStep_monotone cfl uLeft uRight M M
    hcflLower hcflUpper hLeftUpper hRightUpper
have hUpper : laxFriedrichsStep cfl uLeft uRight ≤ M := by
  simpa [laxFriedrichsStep_const] using hUpperStep
exact abs_le.mpr ⟨hLower, hUpper⟩

unfold weightedP0Average
rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
field_simp [hmass] <;> ring

unfold heatLeftWeight heatCenterWeight heatRightWeight
constructor
· exact hr0
· constructor
· linarith
· exact hr0

unfold fluxDifference
rw [kdvCanonicalFlux_const c (i + 1), kdvCanonicalFlux_const c i]
ring

unfold vec2InfNorm diag2First diag2Second
apply max_le
· rw [abs_mul]
exact mul_le_mul ha (le_max_left _ _) (abs_nonneg x) hrho
· rw [abs_mul]
exact mul_le_mul hb (le_max_right _ _) (abs_nonneg y) hrho

unfold finiteRowApply
rw [← Finset.sum_mul, hsum]
ring
